source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend
validation: Exact topology and matching chalkboard, raised pixel-font lettering, inset face, and swept perimeter frame. The original float32 seed coordinates are preserved, authored Mesh to Curve cycles retain their stored edge discovery order, and Merge by Distance outputs use Blender's canonical post-weld order. Maximum local-bounds difference is 0.003001 units from cyclic frame interpolation.
